steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer is $4x^2+20x+18$, so B is correct.

steps.title: Track all three pieces
steps.content: The expression has three parts: $pv$, $-2p$, and $+v$. The final $+v$ adds $x+6$, which is why the middle coefficient becomes $20$ instead of $19$.
